meaning: adj.常浮现于脑海中的,不易忘怀的
examples: No matter, she found that it was an idea that would not down,' but persisted in haunting her.
Monks in orange robes offer flowers and food to the gods and produce haunting sounds on conch shells.
And all along I could hear that voice call, haunting me all that day long.
That does not make the house on Seymour Avenue haunted, but it certainly makes it haunting.
